title: Structured Service Catalog
description: Output of POST /api/structure-catalog. Works for any agency type (PR, consulting, tech).

services.description: List of services extracted from raw text

serviceName.description: Short name for the service (e.g. Communications Strategy, Media Relations)

valueProposition.description: One sentence starting with an active verb. Authority signals (e.g. 400+ placements, $50M) may be wrapped in ** for bold.

keywords.description: Primary SEO/target keywords for this service

assetMapping.description: Image filenames and contact info extracted from raw text

label.description: Short label (e.g. Hero Image, Leadership Bio, Contact)

value.description: Filename (e.g. image_7132a7.png) or contact detail (e.g. info@example.com | 416-797-8194)
